# FastMAPOL Algorithm Theoretical Basis Document

## Overview

FastMAPOL (Fast Multi-Angle Polarimetric Ocean and Land algorithm) retrieves aerosol and ocean optical properties from multi-angle polarimetric observations acquired by the PACE polarimeters, including HARP2 and SPEXone.

This document describes the theoretical framework, forward modeling, retrieval methodology, and data products produced by FastMAPOL.

## Contents

This document will include the following major components:

- Algorithm components
- Aerosol optical model
- Ocean bio-optical model
- Land surface model
- Neural network forward model
- Retrieval uncertainty
- Level-2 data products
- Validation using HARP2 and SPEXone observations
